onset.Gabor_contrast: Gabor contrast used in that trial (variable due to the online calibration)

trial_type.Description: Event marker value from the EEG recording

Levels.11: Vertical Gabor presented at the left hemifield
Levels.12: Horizontal Gabor presented at the left hemifield
Levels.128: Photodiode to correct screen delays: replace each 128 with the next trigger code (delayed) and then forget about the rest of the triggers
Levels.21: Vertical Gabor presented at the right hemifield
Levels.22: Horizontal Gabor presented at the right hemifield
Levels.31: Absent Gabor after a left cue
Levels.32: Absent Gabor after a right cue

Subjective_response.Description: Response provided to the subjetive question (have you seen the Gabor?)

Levels.0: Unseen Gabor, codified in raw data with code 125
Levels.1: Seen Gabor, codified in raw data with code 124

Objective_response.Description: Response provided to the subjetive question (have you seen the Gabor?)

Levels.1: Gabor reported as vertical, codified in raw data with code 121
Levels.2: Gabor reported as horizontal, codified in raw data with code 122
